name: George, Bishop of Mitylene
kontakia: (Tone 4) By the force of your meekness you were a source of light.* You thoroughly beat down the revolt of devils,* showing a spiritual bravery, O venerable father.* In your great love you gave alms to the poor and food to the hungry.* Upon your death you inherited an ageless reward,* rejoicing until the end of time, O blessed bishop George.* Beg Christ to forgive our sins,* for we celebrate your holy memory with love.
